description: A legacy Patient Administration System is sending raw HL7 v2.5 ADT (Admission) messages to the Oracle database table RAW_HL7_LOG. Parse these text messages and extract structured patient data into a new table PATIENT_ADMISSIONS using the provided credentials (User: hr, Pass: hr123, Service: XEPDB1). The PATIENT_ADMISSIONS table must include columns: MRN (VARCHAR2), PATIENT_NAME (VARCHAR2, format 'Last, First'), ADMISSION_DATE (DATE), MESSAGE_EVENT (VARCHAR2), and DIAGNOSIS_CODE (VARCHAR2). Implement a PL/SQL procedure named PARSE_HL7_BATCH that iterates through RAW_HL7_LOG, parses the HL7 text in the MESSAGE_BODY column, and populates PATIENT_ADMISSIONS. Follow these HL7 parsing rules: MSH-9 for Message Event, PID-3 for MRN (first component), PID-5 for Name (Last^First), PV1-44 for Admission Date (YYYYMMDDHHMM or YYYYMMDD), and DG1-3 for Diagnosis Code (first component). Handle variable date formats and missing DG1 segments gracefully.
